name: Waste Coyote
description: Common Waste predator — crocodile-bear hybrid on all fours, packs of 4–12 led by an alpha. Hunts to eat but can survive long periods without food (possibly ambient P.P.E.). Ambushes with decoys; fearless of guns and most Nightlord minions except Lizard Kings and large Hound/Hunter/Nightbane parties. Non-sentient animal intelligence.

classAbilities.name: Animal Intelligence
classAbilities.description: I.Q. 2D4 — high animal intelligence; cunning pack hunter, not a speaking character race.

classAbilities.name: Tracking
classAbilities.description: Track by both sight and scent at 78% (innate skill).

classAbilities.name: Natural Combat
classAbilities.description: Natural abilities — three attacks per melee round; no Hand to Hand or O.C.C. skill program.

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +1 initiative, +4 on all Perception rolls — apply at table in addition to attribute bonuses.

classAbilities.name: Damage
classAbilities.description: Bite 4D6 S.D.C. Claws inflict supernatural P.S. damage plus 2D6 S.D.C.

classAbilities.name: Habitat
classAbilities.description: Nightlands deserts and mountains; packs of 2D6 may appear on Earth via Rifts, gates, or anomalies.

classAbilities.name: Enemies
classAbilities.description: Hunted by Hounds and Hunters (pelts decorate Nightlord halls); preys on most life forms; avoids Lizard Kings and large minion war parties.

name: Lizard King
description: Supernatural Komodo-like predator — psychic vampire feeding on death-agonies and P.P.E.; lurks near ley lines and nexuses in the Nightlands and occasionally on Earth. Hunts all living things without fear; Hunter patrols slay on sight. Waste legends tell of tamed war mounts, unproven. Animal intelligence; non-sentient creature stat block.

classAbilities.name: Animal Intelligence
classAbilities.description: I.Q. 1D6 — animal intelligence; too ferocious (or stupid) to fear most threats.

classAbilities.name: Psychic Vampire Feeding
classAbilities.description: Nourishment from death-agonies and P.P.E. Can survive 1D4 months without feeding, or indefinitely within one mile (1.6 km) of a ley line or nexus. Loses 1 P.P.E. per week without feeding unless near ley line/nexus.

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Heals 1D4×10 S.D.C./H.P. per minute (4 melee rounds).

classAbilities.name: Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 1000 ft (305 m); fair day vision; track by smell 54% (innate skill).

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 12 against normal weapons; A.R. 0 against magical and supernatural attacks.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Combat
classAbilities.description: Four attacks per melee round; no Hand to Hand or O.C.C. skill program.

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 on all Perception rolls — apply at table in addition to attribute bonuses.

classAbilities.name: Damage
classAbilities.description: Bite 5D6 S.D.C.; kick 3D6 S.D.C.; tail swipe 4D6; head butt 2D6; body ram/trample 5D6 S.D.C.

classAbilities.name: Habitat & Enemies
classAbilities.description: Any terrain; favors ley lines and nexuses. Nightlord minions hunt them; preys on most life forms.
